text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Ah... P-please excuse me for yawning in the
middle of training.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I went to bed at a proper time last night, but I
had a bit of a bad dream.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Well, it involved Gold Ship shoving me into a
rocket...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Urgh... I'm sorry, I can't bear to say any more. The
mere thought of it is giving me the shivers.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I feel so disheartened. Was my day off yesterday a waste?
